# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

resources:
  - name: sqlDB
    type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    location: <location>
    properties:
      collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      containedDatabaseCollation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      createMode: Default
      edition: Standard
      requestedServiceObjectiveName: S2
      sku:
        name: S2
      storageAutoGrow: false
      storageAutoShrink: false
      maxSizeBytes: 1073741824

  - name: sqlServer
    type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    location: <location>
    properties:
      administratorLogin: <username>
      administratorLoginPassword: <password>
